description.value:
Your body has developed a reserve of extra chemicals that can be used to produce smaller expulsions. You gain a flame belch ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 30 feet that deals @Damage[1d4[fire]] damage. When you critically succeed at a flame belch Strike, the target takes persistent fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1). Flame belches don't add critical specialization effects. You take a –2 circumstance penalty on attacks with your flame belch if you can't use your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath].

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Admixture Breath], you can use it to change the type of damage you deal with Flame Belch.
